title: [YTP] Spider-Man Loves His Sticky Hands
description:
He's been playing with himself... in the form of action figures, of course! 😉

Could I have done more with this? Of course, but I really just wanted to produce it quickly and get it out quickly because I have bigger fish currently frying.
